semantic.role: Unit test suite for the SummarizationTask module's pure helper functions.
responsibilities: Verify the hasAllRequestedMarkdown function correctly identifies whether all requested locale markdown blocks are present and non-empty.
Verify the formatting helper that converts an array of strings into a markdown bullet list.
outOfScope: External module API definition or contract
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule test-file-suffix) – this file complies.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide automated verification of the summarization module's core helper logic to ensure correct output formatting and locale completeness.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactored CLI aliases, documentation, schema, and tests (per recent commit).
